title: Service & Task (Windows)
description: Perintah untuk mengelola Windows Services, Scheduled Tasks, dan Event Log.

commands.name: sc-service
commands.title: sc — Service Control Manager
commands.description: Mengelola Windows Services dari command line. Tool utama untuk service management.
commands.examples:
# Status service
sc query wuauserv

# Semua service
sc query type= service state= all

# Jalankan service
sc start wuauserv

# Hentikan service
sc stop wuauserv

# Set auto-start
sc config wuauserv start= auto

# Set disabled
sc config wuauserv start= disabled

# PowerShell
Get-Service
Get-Service wuauserv
Start-Service wuauserv
Stop-Service wuauserv
Set-Service wuauserv -StartupType Automatic
commands.notes: Perhatikan spasi setelah '=' di sc (contoh: start= auto, bukan start=auto).

commands.name: net-service
commands.title: net start/stop — Kontrol Service Cepat
commands.description: Cara cepat untuk menjalankan dan menghentikan service Windows.
commands.examples:
# List service berjalan
net start

# Jalankan service
net start "Windows Update"
net start wuauserv

# Hentikan service
net stop wuauserv

# Restart (stop lalu start)
net stop wuauserv && net start wuauserv

commands.name: schtasks
commands.title: schtasks — Scheduled Tasks
commands.description: Mengelola scheduled tasks (task terjadwal) di Windows. Setara dengan cron di Linux.

options.description: Schedule: MINUTE, HOURLY, DAILY, WEEKLY, MONTHLY, ONCE, ONSTART, ONLOGON

commands.examples:
# List semua tasks
schtasks /query

# Task harian jam 02:00
schtasks /create /tn "Backup" /tr "C:\backup.bat" /sc daily /st 02:00

# Task setiap 5 menit
schtasks /create /tn "Monitor" /tr "monitor.bat" /sc minute /mo 5

# Task saat startup
schtasks /create /tn "AutoStart" /tr "app.exe" /sc onstart

# Jalankan sekarang
schtasks /run /tn "Backup"

# Hapus task
schtasks /delete /tn "Backup" /f

# PowerShell
Get-ScheduledTask
Start-ScheduledTask -TaskName "Backup"
Unregister-ScheduledTask -TaskName "Backup"

commands.name: eventlog
commands.title: wevtutil / Get-EventLog — Event Log
commands.description: Mengelola dan membaca Windows Event Log. Setara dengan journalctl di Linux.
commands.examples:
# List log
wevtutil el

# Baca 10 event terakhir dari System
wevtutil qe System /c:10 /f:text

# Clear log
wevtutil cl Application

# PowerShell: Event log
Get-EventLog -LogName System -Newest 20
Get-EventLog -LogName Application -EntryType Error -Newest 10

# PowerShell: Get-WinEvent (modern)
Get-WinEvent -LogName System -MaxEvents 20
Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System'; Level=2} -MaxEvents 10
